case_title: MING C. LEE VS. JOHN BERGLOFF

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, MING C. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506). BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST- DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT DOCUMENTS IN ADVANCE OF FUTURE HEARING. DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST APPEARANCES BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT MAY SUBMIT INFORMATION PERTAINING TO VEXATIOUS LITIGANT CLAIM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK; F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)

ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". MOTION FOR SECURITY AND TO DECLARE PARTY A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IS DENIED. THE VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PROCEDURE DOES NOT APPLY TO SMALL CLAIMS CASES, SUCH THAT THIS COURT DOES NOT HAVE THE POWER TO DECLARE A PARTY A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. COPY OF THE ORDER MAILED TO PARTIES.
ORDER (SC-105A): ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. "PLAINTIFF MAY RESET CASE FOR HEARING AT HIS REQUEST".
